alkylation reagent: alkylated with 50 mM iodoacetamide for 1 h at RT
alkylation concentration: alkylated with 50 mM iodoacetamide for 1 h at RT
cleavage agent: digested using trypsin (sequencing-grade, Promega; 1 μg trypsin:50 μg total protein)
enrichment method: phosphopeptides were additionally enriched by IMAC using Fe-NTA Agarose beads
instrument: Mass spectra were acquired using a 9.4 T SolariX XR FT-ICR MS
ionization type: 3D MALDI MSI acquired on a 9.4 T Fourier transform ion cyclotron resonance (FT-ICR) MS
labeling: labeled with tandem-mass tag (TMT)−10-plex Mass Tag Labeling Kits
reduction reagent: reduced with 10 mM dithiothreitol (DTT) for 1 h at 56 °C
reduction concentration: reduced with 10 mM dithiothreitol (DTT) for 1 h at 56 °C
